name: Coca-Cola Bottlers Japan Holdings Inc.
summary: Coca-Cola Bottlers Japan Holdings Inc., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the purchasing, bottling, packaging, distributing, marketing, and selling of carbonated, coffee, and tea-based beverages, mineral water, and other soft drinks in Japan. It operates through Beverage Business and Healthcare & Skincare Business segments. The company offers its products under the Coca-Cola, Fanta, Sprite, Real Gold, Georgia, Aquarius, Qoo, Sokenbicha, Huang, and Kochakaden brands. It also manufactures and sells kale juice and other products, as well as health foods, cosmetics, and other related products. In addition, the company is involved in the operation of vending machines; and real estate, insurance agency, and investment businesses. Coca-Cola Bottlers Japan Holdings Inc. sells its products through supermarkets and convenience stores, vending machines, restaurants, kiosks, etc. The company was formerly known as Coca-Cola Bottlers Japan Inc. and changed its name to Coca-Cola Bottlers Japan Holdings Inc. in January 2018. Coca-Cola Bottlers Japan Holdings Inc. was founded in 1960 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
